# Risk Report

## Purpose
Communicate risk exposure trends, top risks, and response effectiveness.

## Audience
Project Manager, Risk & Issue Manager, Sponsors, PMO.

## 1. Reporting Period
- **Period start:**
- **Period end:**
- **Prepared by:**

## 2. Top Risks (by Exposure)
| Risk ID | Description | Probability | Impact | Exposure | Owner | Response Strategy |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

## 3. Risk Trend Charts
- **Risk exposure trend:** *(insert chart placeholder)*
- **Risk count by category:** *(insert chart placeholder)*

## 4. New Risks Since Last Report
| Risk ID | Description | Initial Exposure | Owner | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## 5. Closed Risks
| Risk ID | Closure Date | Outcome | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 6. Summary of Risk Responses
Describe key mitigation actions, transfers, or acceptances completed this period.

## 7. Recommendations
List any escalation requests or recommended actions for leadership.

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Top risks ranked by exposure.
- [ ] Trend charts updated for reporting period.
- [ ] Recommendations documented with owners.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Risk report reflects current register data and response status.
- Stakeholders can identify shifts in exposure and required decisions.
